results.title: Senior H^Full^H H^Stack^H H^Developer^H for API Integration
results.description: We are seeking an experienced H^React.js^H H^developer^H to enhance our application by developing new features and integrating APIs. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in H^full^H H^stack^H H^development^H, with a focus on RESTful architecture and API H^development^H. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and testing new features, as well as ensuring seamless API integration. This role requires a proactive approach to problem-solving and collaboration with our team to deliver high-quality solutions.

results.title: H^Full^H H^Stack^H Consulting (H^React^H / Python / C#)
results.description:
We’re building a multi-service platform for project and operations management, combining workflows, data processing, and backend integrations across several services.

We’re looking for experienced H^full^H-H^stack^H consulting support to review architecture, improve system design, and guide key technical decisions.

This is not a small feature or bug-fixing job - we need engineers who can think at system level and help us stabilize and scale an existing production codebase.

Scope:
Architecture review & system design
Backend consulting (Python: FastAPI / Django)
Frontend improvements (H^React^H)
C# services and integrations support
API design, performance, and reliability improvements
Code review and technical guidance
Tech H^stack^H:

H^React^H, Python (FastAPI / Django), C# (.NET), PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker

What we’re looking for:
Strong system design and H^full^H-H^stack^H experience
Hands-on production background with complex systems
Ability to work across multiple technologies
Practical, high-signal engineering mindset

If you’ve built or scaled multi-service systems, we’d like to connect.

results.title: H^Full^H-H^Stack^H H^Developer^H for SaaS Platform
results.description:
I need an experienced H^full^H-H^stack^H H^developer^H to build and continuously improve a SaaS platform. You’ll own the entire H^stack^H - frontend, backend, database.

It will be a multi-tenant SaaS product where users sign up, manage their workspace, and perform core actions like (e.g., creating projects, processing payments, uploading files, viewing analytics). The MVP must be scalable, secure, and responsive on all devices.

Technical expectations:

Frontend: H^React^H or Vue.H^js^H. 

Backend: Node.H^js^H (Express/NestH^JS^H), Python (Django or FastAPI).

Database: PostgreSQL or MongoDB.

results.title: H^Full^H H^Stack^H Front End H^developer^H with AI knowledge for quick deployment.
results.description:
H^React^H/Next.H^js^H H^Developer^H with Server-Side rendering experience
and good CSS skills, with the use of AI assistants
Work on a complex Next.H^js^H application that is used as a web platform, but also as a
mobile application (Capacitor), with the integration of advanced monitoring tools
(Sentry), environment management and resource optimization (CDN, SVG-in-H^JS^H).
Technical specification of knowledge and skills that a Frontend H^Developer^H must possess
to work on the  project:
Main Frontend Technologies (H^React^H Ecosystem)
 Legacy H^React^H architecture:
Excellent knowledge of H^React^H 16 or higher.
- Understanding the differences between class and functional components.
- Working with the Hooks API.
 State Management:
Advanced knowledge of Redux and H^React^H-Redux.
 Routing:
Manage in-app routes using H^React^H Router v5 or higher (H^react^H-router-dom).
- Work with dynamic routes, query parameters via query-string and H^react^H-url-query.
 Forms and validation:
Creating complex forms through Formik and defining data validation rules using
the Yup library.
 Styling:
Working with Sass/SCSS preprocessors and Styled-Components for a CSS-in-
H^JS^H approach.
- Styling components through Bootstrap 4 and Reactstrap.
 HTTP client:
Sending API requests, handling interceptors and error handling through the
Axios library.
Using AI tools for rapid coding (AI-Driven H^Development^H)
 AI assistants:
Effective use of tools such as "GitHub Copilot Workspace" (an AI assistant that
is integrated into JetBrains (WebStorm)), or similar.
1
 Prompt Engineering for H^Developers^H:
Writing precise instructions for generating code, refactoring, and writing tests.
 AI code Validation:
Ability to critically review, understand and correct code generated by AI (AI often
fails with older libraries like H^React^H 16 and H^React^H Router 5).
 Acceleration of H^Development^H:
Using AI to quickly generate Bootstrap layouts, write Regex expressions,
transform complex objects through Lodash, and write repetitive Redux code.
Docker and local environment
 Starting the container:
Using basic commands.
 Local H^development^H:
Understanding how Docker maps local files (volumes) so that code changes are
immediately visible in the browser.
 Debugging:
Ability to read logs inside a Docker container when the application is not running.
GitLab and CI/CD processes
 Git GitLab Workflow:
Working with branches (feature branching), creating a Merge Request (MR),
solving conflicts in the code.
 CI/CD Pipeline:
Understanding how GitLab CI/CD automatically runs scripts defined in a project.
Code Quality Tools (Linting & Formatting)
 Code quality:
Knowledge of the workings and rules of ESLint and Prettier.
 Scripts:
Regularly running built-in checks before submitting code to GitLab.
Specific integrations on the project
 Payment:
Implementation and maintenance of card payment forms.
 Security and analytics:
Understanding bot and fraud detection systems via @fingerprintjs/fingerprintjs.
2
 Asset Management:
Advanced work with SVG icons (SVGR) and image optimization.
 UI components:
Working with advanced UI libraries included in the project: graphics (Recharts),
scrolling (Smooth-Scrollbar), animations (H^React^H-Spring), sliders (H^React^H-Slick), and
custom selectors (H^React^H-Select).
 Mobile integration:
Implementing authentication and functionality within the Capacitor environment.
Preferably
 Multitasking
 SEO
 AWS
 Adobe Photoshop
 Microsoft Office
 Google Analytics
 PHP
 Linux
 iOS/Android app
+  Experience with animations and effects would also be required.
 Everything should feel smooth and polished.
 We expect code with cross-browser support (Safari/Chrome/Edge/Firefox).
the project  is served by AWS CloudFront and API Gateway.
We need a link to your latest site built on the H^React^H/Next.H^js^H H^stack^H.  TO MAKE SURE YOU READ THIS TYPE BATMAN IN APPLICATION TITLE

results.title: Senior H^Full^H-H^Stack^H AI engineer
results.description:
We are a fast-growing, agile startup looking for a high-caliber Senior H^Full^H-H^Stack^H AI Engineer to join our team immediately. You will own the architecture and implementation of our core platform, bridging the gap between high-performance user interfaces and complex AI/ML backend workflows.

If you thrive in fast-paced startup environments, love building "AI-native" applications, and take extreme pride in clean, production-grade code, we want to talk to you today.

Key Responsibilities:
Architecture & H^Development^H: Architect, build, and maintain scalable, high-performance web applications using Next.H^js^H (App Router) and Node.H^js^H.

AI/ML Integration: Integrate and optimize LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models) using frameworks like LangChain, LlamaIndex, or Vercel AI SDK.

Data & Infrastructure: Design robust data models and migrations using PostgreSQL/Supabase and vector databases (Pinecone, pgvector) for RAG applications.

Required Technical H^Stack^H & Keywords:

Frontend: H^React^H, Next.H^js^H (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/ui

Backend & APIs: Node.H^js^H, Express, RESTful APIs, WebSockets, Serverless Functions

AI/ML: LLM APIs (GPT-4, Claude), Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), LangChain, Vector Embeddings

Database & Cloud: Supabase, PostgreSQL, Vector DBs (Pinecone/pgvector), AWS (S3, EC2, Lambda)

DevOps & Tools: Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines, Vercel


Qualifications:

Experience: 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a proven track record in a startup or fast-paced technical environment.

Communication: Native or completely fluent English speaker with exceptional communication skills.

Mindset: Self-starter who can navigate ambiguity, make pragmatic architectural trade-offs, and deliver high-quality code under tight deadlines.

Do NOT send a generic, AI-generated proposal. It will be automatically rejected.

results.title: H^Full^H-H^Stack^H H^React^H/Node.H^js^H H^Developer^H - SEO & Feature Optimization
results.description:
I am looking for an experienced H^Full^H-H^stack^H H^Developer^H to help me finalize and optimize some key features on my language learning platform. The project is a dictionary and grammar learning site built with H^React.js^H and Node.H^js^H.
Key Tasks:
SEO Optimization: Audit and fix SEO-related issues to improve search engine visibility for dynamic pages (dictionary and grammar lessons).
Video Integration: Link and embed video content into specific grammar lessons in a clean, responsive layout.
About Page Update: Refresh the design and content of the "About Us" page according to the provided requirements.
Search Logic Improvements: Fine-tune the dictionary search functionality to improve user experience and accuracy.
Requirements:
Strong proficiency in H^React.js^H and Node.H^js^H.
Experience with SEO best practices for SPA (Single Page Applications).
Ability to write clean, maintainable code.
English level: Intermediate or higher (to understand requirements clearly).

results.title: H^Full^H H^Stack^H H^Developer^H
results.description:
Job Description:
We are looking for a motivated and skilled H^Full^H H^Stack^H H^Developer^H to join our software H^development^H team. The candidate should be able to work on both front-end and back-end H^development^H. You will be responsible for building, maintaining, and improving web applications.

results.title: H^Full^H-H^Stack^H Engineer (Both Male & Female H^Developers^H)
results.description:
(Need 2 H^Developers^H - Male and Female H^Developers^H)
GoodieX Tech is a growing digital solutions agency serving clients across the United States, Europe and the Americas. We build websites, software systems, automation tools and business solutions for startups, small businesses and established companies.

We are hiring a versatile remote professional who can contribute across software H^development^H, technical customer support, operations, client communication, administration and project coordination. This role is ideal for someone proactive, organized, dependable and comfortable handling multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment.

-Responsibilities
Build, maintain and improve web applications and internal tools
Provide technical support and guidance to customers
Troubleshoot software issues and coordinate resolutions
Communicate with clients and provide project updates
Manage schedules, emails and administrative tasks
Support internal operations, onboarding and workflow improvements
Perform research, reporting and data management
-Required Skills
Strong English communication
H^Full^H-H^stack^H H^development^H experience
Problem-solving mindset
Excellent organization and time management
Attention to detail
Ability to multitask in a remote environment
Professional attitude and reliability
-Preferred Skills
Experience with one or more of the following is a plus: H^React^H, Node.H^js^H, TypeScript, Python, WordPress, Shopify, CRM tools, customer support systems, AWS, Trello, ClickUp, Asana, Canva or Figma.
-Experience Level: Open to all levels. Training can be provided for the right candidate.
-Pay: $30 - $60 USD per hour (based on experience)
-Job Type: Hourly Contract
-Duration: Long-term / Ongoing Opportunity
-Location: United States, Canada, Europe or Latin America
-How to Apply:
Please send your resume, your experience, short video introduction and weekly availability.

GoodieX Tech HR Team,
Alexus.

results.title: H^React.js^H/Node.H^js^H H^Developer^H for Bug Fixes
results.description: We are seeking a skilled H^React.js^H and Node.H^js^H H^developer^H to address bug fixes and implement minor enhancements. results.title: H^Full^H-H^Stack^H H^Developer^H — H^React^H / Node.H^js^H / Supabase (SaaS Product)
results.description:
About the project
Operra is a SaaS platform built for independent restaurants in the US and UK. It handles operations, subscriptions, and AI-powered features. The app is live at operraapp.com and built with H^React^H, Vite, Node.H^js^H, Express, Supabase, and Stripe.
I need a H^developer^H who can jump into an existing codebase, understand it quickly, and ship reliable features without hand-holding.
What you'll work on

New feature H^development^H across the frontend and backend
Bug fixes and performance improvements
Supabase database work — schema changes, RLS policies, Edge Functions
Stripe billing logic — trials, upgrades, webhooks
API integrations with POS systems and third-party services
Super Admin panel improvements

You must have experience with

H^React^H and JavaScript (no TypeScript required)
Node.H^js^H and Express
Supabase (Auth, database, Edge Functions)
Stripe API
Git and GitHub
Vercel deployments

Nice to have

Prior work on a SaaS product
Experience with multi-tenant architecture
Familiarity with restaurant tech or hospitality software

How we'll work

Async-first, clear task briefs for each feature
Deployed to Vercel — changes go live fast
GitHub for all code, PRs reviewed before merge
Fixed-price per feature or hourly depending on scope

To apply, include:

A link to one project you built or contributed to
One sentence on your Supabase experience specifically
Your hourly rate or rough fixed-price estimate for small features
